Task description, setup_task.sh (uninstalls it), and export_result.sh (checks for its installation).
Local execution of Rscript querying the nycflights13::airlines dataframe confirmed 'UA' maps to 'United Air Lines Inc.'.
Local execution of Rscript querying the nycflights13::airlines dataframe confirmed 'DL' maps to 'Delta Air Lines Inc.'.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes the real-world 'nycflights13' dataset (originating from the US Bureau of Transportation Statistics) by requiring the agent to install the CRAN package. The explicit path requirements for the RMarkdown template, render script, and the output HTML files exactly match the task description and export logic. By directly querying the nycflights13::airlines table via an R script, it was verified that the carrier code 'UA' maps to 'United Air Lines Inc.' and 'DL' maps to 'Delta Air Lines Inc.', which matches the expected substring requirements in the verifier logic.
